title: Inmarsat IsatM2M
short description: IsatM2M Service operated by Inmarsat on existing Inmarsat-D/D+ infrastructure.
description: **IsatM2M Paging Service** was operated by Inmarsat on (then) existing [Inmarsat-D/D+](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Inmarsat-D(D+) Downlink) infrastructure. It was used for transport vehicle security, industrial equipment monitoring (SCADA) and marine tracking. Similar waveform to [Inmarsat-D/D+](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Inmarsat-D(D+) Downlink) but employs faster bit rate and wider bandwidth.
